Name: BehaviorParam
Description: Registers hitboxes and bullets while also handling some special properties

Fields.Description: For Npc's - References the behavioVariationId of the Npc in NpcParam, will only work for Npc's with the same behaviorVariationId. For Player - References behaviorVariationId on weapons, will only work with weapons that have the same behaviorVariationId.
Id used in animations to reference this behavior
Defines what param this behavior references
Determines whether or not this behavior will consume spirit emblems
References AtkParam, Bullet, or SpEffectParam depending upon the refType
Amount of Posture consumed when this behavior is invoked
Amount of Fp/Mp consumed when this behavior is invoked
Unique properties attached to this behavior
Amount of humanity consumed when this behavior is invoked
